title: TePe Colour Compact Toothbrush, Extra Soft, 4pcs, Toothbrush for Older Kids and Adults with a Small Brush Head, ensures Gentle Cleaning with Extra Soft filaments

features: Small toothbrush: The tapered brush head will improve access when brushing. With its smaller brush head, you will get better reach for improved and efficient cleaning. Use together with TePe Daily Toothpaste.

Extra soft bristle brush: The TePe Colour Compact is a toothbrush with extra soft bristles, perfect for older kids or adults who need a gentle toothbrush. The extra soft filaments provide a soft and gentle tooth care, for healthier teeth and gum.

Bendable neck: For better reach, the neck of the toothbrush can be angled after heating in hot water. This will enable a more suffient cleaning with better access to the back teeth. Brush with light pressure and small movements.
Different colours: The handle of the TePe Colour Compact toothbrush is available in different colours, for example dark blue, pink and green. The extra soft filaments are available in green and pink.

TePe is an Oral Care brand recommended by dentists and dental hygienist, made in Sweden. All products are designed, developed and manufactured in collaboration with dental specialists to achieve the highest utility and quality.
description: Product Description The TePe Colour Compact toothbrush is an extra soft, high-quality toothbrush with a tapered brush head for easy and improved access. For even better reach, the neck of the TePe Colour Compact can be angled after heating in hot water. The end-rounded filaments ensure a gentle and efficient cleaning. To ensure efficient and gentle plaque removal while protecting the enamel, TePe Colour Compact has been developed together with dental experts. The Colour Compact toothbrush is available in different colours and is suitable for adults and older children. Use twice a day, morning and evening together with TePe Toothpaste. Assorted colours = What colour that is sent is at random. Directions See 'reason' field. Safety Warning Beware of strangulation hazard for young children. Replace your brush heads regularly.
